items.name: Tier 1 Ready
items.description: Earned through steady participation in Tier 1 case studies and frontline support learning sessions.

items.name: Tier 1 Practitioner
items.description: Demonstrates consistent handling of common Tier 1 scenarios and active contribution during support reviews.

items.name: Tier 1 Troubleshooter
items.description: Shows strong issue diagnosis and clear explanation skills in recurring frontline support cases.

items.name: Tier 1 Enablement Specialist
items.description: Recognizes sustained contribution to Tier 1 coaching, case-study sharing, and practical support guidance.
